title: Login page not loading
description: User unable to access login page after clicking the login button.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer requested password reset but did not receive any email.

title: Error 500 on dashboard
description: Internal server error appears when accessing dashboard.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Changes made to profile information are not being saved.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transaction fails due to payment gateway timeout error.

title: Mobile view layout broken
description: UI components overlapping on smaller screen devices.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Search results take too long to display.

title: Account suspended without notice
description: Customer claims account was suspended without prior notification.

title: Notification settings not working
description: User cannot enable or disable email notifications.

title: File upload failed
description: System shows error when uploading PDF files.

title: Incorrect invoice generated
description: Generated invoice shows incorrect total amount.

title: Dark mode toggle not working
description: Clicking dark mode toggle does not change theme.

title: Session expires too quickly
description: User session automatically logs out within 5 minutes.

title: Data export not downloading
description: CSV export option does not trigger file download.

title: Broken link in footer
description: Contact us link in footer redirects to 404 page.
